name: Bà Nguyễn Thị Lan
notes: Elderly Vietnamese woman living alone. Fixed income from Social Security ($1,100/mo). Medical expenses of $250/mo for hypertension and arthritis medications — qualifies for elderly/disabled medical expense deduction which may be under-applied. No WIC (no children in household). Qualifies for Senior Farmers Market Nutrition Program (SFMNP) — $50 seasonal voucher for farmers markets. Prefers Vietnamese ingredients: fish sauce, rice, bok choy, tofu, lemongrass. Limited mobility; prefers stores on bus routes. Lives at 619 H St NE, Washington DC 20002.
